title: Not a Moon
storyPurpose: Riftwright Elyan Voss explains what the Star is.

panels.description: Forge Network observatory (restored Engines cradle glow): Professor Elyan Voss the Riftwright — alive, retired/hopeful advisor, older brilliant engineer-scholar, ink-stained fingers, softer forge-coat with crystal lenses, weary hopeful eyes — projects a rotating hologram of the Shattered Star — floating continents, crystal oceans, gold rings — while Mira, supervised-ally Cael, uneasy-ally Aurelia, and ally Nira listen.

bubbles.text: It is not a moon. It is not a ship.
bubbles.speaker: Professor Elyan Voss

bubbles.text: It is a drifting world — a celestial sanctuary older than our records.
bubbles.speaker: Professor Elyan Voss

panels.description: Close on hologram label-free shape: Shattered Star with sleeping companion silhouettes inside chambers.

bubbles.text: Long ago it carried every surviving Prime Companion away from this world.
bubbles.speaker: Professor Elyan Voss
Professor Elyan Voss
bubbles.text: I am retired from engines… not from hope. The Ascendant fell — but an older hand still hides.

grokPrompt: Original high-energy Western fantasy comic storytelling with dynamic panel composition, dramatic inked linework, richly painted colors, expressive character acting, and clear cinematic action. Original Riftwilds IP only. White crystal and emerald vegetation first; gold architecture, aurora lighting, cyan-gold Rift accents, blue cavern skies with visible stars, floating waterfalls. NO purple neon AI-fantasy default. NO Marvel/DC/Pokémon characters or logos. Riftwilds comic "The Shattered Star" Issue #10 Volume Two, STORY PAGE 3/25 — Not a Moon. Story purpose: Riftwright Elyan Voss explains what the Star is. Layout: two-col. 2 panels with clear inked gutters. Panel 1 (p3a): Forge Network observatory: Professor Elyan Voss the Riftwright: older brilliant engineer-scholar, ink-stained fingers, forge-coat with crystal lenses, weary hope, not a villain silhouette projects a rotating hologram of the Shattered Star — floating continents, crystal oceans, gold rings — while Mira, Cael, Aurelia listen. Panel 2 (p3b): Close on hologram label-free shape: Shattered Star with sleeping companion silhouettes inside chambers. Characters: mira-eggwarden, elyan-voss, cael-vesper, aurelia-voss. Creatures: spark, nova, axiom. Spark design lock: Spark the Glowpup-line Riftborn hatchling: soft luminous fur, cyan-gold rift markings, large expressive eyes, small crystal growths, glowing-tip emotional tail, steadier aura when bonded; cute but original — not a franchise mascot. Nova design lock: Nova: newly hatched Prime Companion from Issue #9, sleek luminous body with star-seam fur, twin Resonance Key glow matching Spark, constellation freckles, curious protective eyes, adolescent Prime silhouette — original species. Keeper lock: Mira Eggwarden: young adult Hatchery mentor/Keeper, warm brown skin, dark hair in practical braid, travel-stained hatchery coat over Compact robes, Compact lantern charm on satchel, determined protective eyes. Lyra lock: High Keeper Lyra: tall elegant Celestial Keeper, long white hair, gold and white armor, blue crystal crown, elegant cloak with ancient companion markings, calm stern eyes, floating gold relics. Astra lock: Astra: massive celestial wolf Prime Companion, galaxy fur with constellation markings, golden antlers, blue crystalline wings, nebula tail, legendary support presence. Axiom lock: Axiom: small floating crystalline fox prototype, transparent body with glowing circuitry, holographic tail, soft cyan-gold light. Environment: Shattered Star celestial sanctuary. Time: day-aurora. Weather: rift aurora mist. Lighting: white crystal, gold architecture, aurora cyan-gold. Continuity: {"starIdentity": "celestial-sanctuary"} Leave empty balloon-safe and narration-safe negative space. NO readable text in artwork. NO Cal Reed.
negativePrompt: readable dialogue text, captions, logos, watermarks, page numbers, UI chrome, Marvel, DC, Pokémon, manga screentone trademarks, extra limbs, duplicate characters, purple neon fantasy default, photoreal modern clothing, Pikachu lookalike, Cal Reed, Voltkit
letteringInstructions: Standard speech + narration; tails off faces and Spark/Nova/Astra eyes; Lyra speech calm/stern.
artAlt: Not a Moon — The Shattered Star page 3
transcript: SPEECH (Professor Elyan Voss): It is not a moon. It is not a ship.
SPEECH (Professor Elyan Voss): It is a drifting world — a celestial sanctuary older than our records.
SPEECH (Professor Elyan Voss): Long ago it carried every surviving Prime Companion away from this world.
SPEECH (Professor Elyan Voss): I am retired from engines… not from hope. The Ascendant fell — but an older hand still hides.
SPEECH (Mira Eggwarden): And now it came back.
